programme.desc: Seeking revenge for his family’s death, Frank stages a crime and turns himself in to infiltrate a prison drug ring. Frank aims to get close to the man responsible for their death, and forms a dangerous bond with a guard along the way.

programme.desc: Lúcia is raped by her husband and presses charges against him. In her quest for justice, she must battle her husband who is the son of the State's Vice Attorney, and the Portuguese legal system with its patriarchal beliefs.

programme.title: The Daval Mystery
programme.desc: Jonathann Daval reports the disappearance of his wife Alexia after she fails to return from her morning jog. Over the next three months, the police will launch the most relentless investigation into a media saga that will shake the whole of France.

programme.title: Falling Into Place
programme.desc: Kira and Ian meet all too briefly over a winter weekend on the Isle of Skye and form a sudden and deep bond. Back in London, they try to move on with their separate lives - but both have to stop running from themselves before they are ready to meet again.

programme.title: Victoria Must Go
programme.desc: Hedvig and Henrik's new stepmother Victoria is annoying and constantly introducing new rules. They decide to hire a hitman to get rid of her, and end up persuading a very reluctant immigrant, Carl, to do the job.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: Train Driver's Diary
programme.desc: As Ilija nears retirement, his record of unintentional deaths as a train driver weighs heavy. His adopted son, Sima, fears following in his footsteps. But as days pass without incident, Ilija's determination to ensure Sima's success takes a dark turn.

programme.title: El Alamein
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of searing daytime heat and chilling nighttime cold, three-time Italian Academy Awards winner Enzo Monteleone paints a gritty, powerful WW II epic of the Italian army’s battle with the Germans to drive Allied Forces from North Africa.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: The film tells the stories of different people and how they are intertwined surrounding the gruesome death of a man who got thrown out of a window.

programme.title: Time For Love
programme.desc: Mikolaj jumps on a train smitten by a beautiful woman. But he is without a ticket. With the aid of charming Edyta, he tries to control the chaos on the train and in his life. Will this journey be enough to find love before Christmas?

programme.title: A Tale of Samurai Cooking - A True Love Story
programme.desc: Great cook Haru has married into the legendary “Kitchen Samurai” family. But her husband who is the successor of the Funaki family cannot cook at all. Haru makes a vow to make him a superb samurai chef and starts teaching her new husband how to cook.

programme.title: Submission
programme.desc: Lúcia is raped by her husband and presses charges against him. In her quest for justice, she must battle her husband who is the son of the State's Vice Attorney, and the Portuguese legal system with its patriarchal beliefs.

programme.desc: Comvita™ 10+ Manuka Honey is a premium honey from New Zealand that supports immunity and aids digestion. Collagen Peptide Manuka Honey Drink supports skin, joint, and bone health while boosting hydration and elasticity. Night Rejuvenating Manuka Honey is the world’s first honey designed to protect the liver with rejuvenating properties that provides detoxification while you sleep. Comvita™ 10+ 麦卢卡蜂蜜是来自新西兰的优质蜂蜜，因其抗菌特性而闻名。它有助于增强免疫力，缓解喉咙痛，并促进消化。胶原蛋白肽麦芦卡蜂蜜饮品有助于皮肤、关节和骨骼健康，同时改善皮肤水分和弹性。刺梨朝鲜蓟麦芦卡蜂蜜饮品是全球首款设计用于保护肝脏的蜂蜜，结合了麦卢卡蜂蜜的益处和修复特性，支持整体健康和帮助睡眠时排毒。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - i-Running TM-299 Foldable Treadmill
programme.desc: Compact, slim, and ready to use straight out of the box. Walk or jog anytime with quiet operation, shock absorption for joint comfort, and adjustable speed and incline. programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Collagen Diamond Pro
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu’s newly upgraded Collagen Diamond Pro combines 5,500mg of marine collagen peptides with NMN, Resveratrol, and Astaxanthin to rejuvenate your skin from within. programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: Aroma Syawal
programme.desc: In 'AROMA SYAWAL,' a daughter's love and her father's fading memory rekindle through the aroma of cherished recipes, unveiling family secrets and the enduring Hari Raya spirit.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 1
programme.desc: Ghazali moved back to his hometown with his wife and step child because he was transferred to a nearby school. His return is not welcomed by his mother. In addition, Ghazali still carries a grudge against his neighbour, Wak Tarjo because of an incident.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 2
programme.desc: Helmi does not want to stay with his parents at their new home. The relationship between Nek Munah and her step grandchild, Badriah is better. However, Nek Munah still does not accept the existence of her daughter-in-law, Leha in her life.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 3
programme.desc: Due to Wak Tarjo's accident, the villagers work together to clean the big drain. Omar also starts his own business to compete with his father. Meanwhile, Helmi causes another accident in the village.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 4
programme.desc: The villagers work hard to get ready for Raya even though the water levels are rising. Harianto insists on bringing Helmi back to his flat after another problem arises. On the night of Raya, Ghazali did not return home.

programme.title: Banjir Raya - EP 5
programme.desc: The heavy rain has fallen and many places have been flooded. The villagers are forced to flee to a safer place. However, they worry if their homes will be safe while trying to find their missing family members.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 1
programme.desc: Two weeks before Ramadan starts, Ratna and Farah attend a relatives wedding and bump into an old ex-university mate, Stanley, who is now a Muslim convert. Around the same time, both are asked to lead teams to help fund raise at Ustaz Umars' Insan for a Ramadan project. This year also marks the first Ramadan since the death of the cousins grandmother. Farah's mother, Maria, reminds her siblings to continue with their late mum's family traditions.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 2
programme.desc: Abdullah (Stanley) invites Ratna and Farah to join a weekend online religious class. Maria notices Mardiana is distracted and reminds her to not to be too preoccupied with trivial stuff and instead stay focussed on Ramadan. Maria resolves to stay away from social media for one month. At Insan, Ratna decides to 'take charge' and her behaviour is not welcomed by Farah.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S9 - EP 6
programme.desc: In the 9th season of Upin and Ipin, the boys are excited to play with Tok Dalang's little chicks. They learn about different kinds of books as their homework and overcoming the dengue fever spread over Kampung Durian Runtuh.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 18
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: JMJ Magika Raya
programme.desc: JMJ Magika Raya follows Ayla on a magical journey exploring heritage and the spirit of Hari Raya. One day, Ayla quarrels with her mum and falls asleep while clutching a folklore book. In a dreamlike world, she meets legendary Malay icons such as Hang Nadim, Radin Mas and Badang. Through these encounters, Ayla learns that the true spirit of Raya lies in forgiveness, gratitude, love and togetherness.

programme.title: Sinar Lebaran 2026
programme.desc: Sinar Lebaran 2026 is a festive homecoming like no other—uniting an orchestral experience with laugh-out-loud Raya skits, as beloved homegrown stars return to honour their roots. Anchored by Hafidz Rahman, Zuhairi Idris, Farhana M Noor, this edition welcomes a pulang kampung line-up featuring the legendary M. Nasir. A tribute to heritage, love and belonging—reminding us that wherever life takes us,HOME is where the ketupat is!

programme.title: Ubi Superstar Raya
programme.desc: Get ready for a Raya celebration like no other with Ubi Superstar Raya! Packed with hilarious sketches, catchy musical parodies and plenty of festive cheer. This comedy stage special brings together the funniest highlights of Ubi for non-stop laughs.

programme.title: Zaman Sekolah S4 - EP 9
programme.desc: "Zaman Sekolah" is a nostalgic journey back to the cherished days of schooling, where life-long memories and foundations were built. Each episode dives deep into the heart of what school life meant for our celebrity guests who return to their alma maters to relive and share their most poignant and formative experiences.

programme.title: Saat Hilang Tong Gas Mu
programme.desc: Azal works tirelessly, driving trucks during the day and selling bundles online at night after Azrina's parent request a dowry of RM20,000 for their marriage. When his lorry is stolen, he manages to recover it, but discovers that 200 gas cylinders worth RM20,000 are missing. With the wedding just a month away, Azal must find the money or risk losing Azrina.

As Hari Raya approaches, Eid, struggles to finish the orders. In addition, she has to restore her reputation that is ruined by an unhappy customer's viral video.
